title: Tick Control in Fieldston, Bronx | $125-$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Fieldston, Bronx. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Prices $125-$325. Licensed exterminators. Call today!
intro: Fieldston's tree-lined streets, private estates, and proximity to Van Cortlandt Park create an ideal environment for ticks to thrive. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout this historic Bronx neighborhood, protecting families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our treatments are tailored to Fieldston's unique landscape of wooded properties and manicured lawns.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Fieldston's residential community, we understand the specific tick challenges posed by the neighborhood's abundant greenery and proximity to natural areas. Our eco-conscious treatments are safe for children and pets while being highly effective against deer ticks, dog ticks, and other species common to the area.
localContext: Fieldston's distinctive Tudor and Colonial homes sit on sprawling, wooded lots that provide perfect habitats for tick populations, especially near the edges of Van Cortlandt Park and along the nature-rich Fieldston Road corridor. The neighborhood's commitment to preserving its natural character means property owners must be proactive about tick control to safely enjoy their outdoor spaces.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Fieldston?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Fieldston typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, during mild winters, ticks can remain active year-round in the Bronx. We recommend starting preventive treatments in early spring before tick populations peak.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Fieldston?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Fieldston range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, level of infestation, and treatment frequency. Larger estates with extensive wooded areas may require more comprehensive treatment. We offer free inspections and customized quotes for all Fieldston properties.

faqs.question: Are tick treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians follow strict application protocols, and treated areas are typically safe for re-entry within 2-4 hours after treatment. We also offer organic tick control options for environmentally-conscious Fieldston residents.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule tick control treatments?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend monthly treatments during peak tick season (April-October) for Fieldston properties. Homes bordering Van Cortlandt Park or with heavily wooded lots may benefit from more frequent applications. A seasonal prevention plan typically includes 4-6 treatments per year to maintain a tick-free yard.
